entries.notes: Bench press 2x15 30lb, overhead shoulder 2x15 20lb, biceps 2x15 20lb, back rows 2x15 20lb, squats 2x20 20lb kettlebell, 31 pushups, 23min light cardio 110bpm
20min bike, 31 pushups, strength training 3x15 (bench 30lb, shoulder 20lb, biceps 20lb, rows 20lb, squats 20lb kettlebell), 6700 steps
30min bike, 32 pushups, rest day from weights but active
31 pushups, 3min bike warmup, 3 sets: bench press 30lb, overhead shoulder 20lb, biceps 20lb, back rows 20lb, squats 20lb kettlebell
Day 6: 195.5 lbs, 30 min bike, 3 sets every exercise (bench 30lb, shoulder 20lb, biceps 20lb, rows 20lb, squats 20lb kettlebell)
Day 6 EXTRA: 3 sets of everything - bench press 30lb, overhead shoulder 20lb, biceps 20lb, back rows 20lb. No legs, no bike.
Day 7: Rest day from weights, 25 min bike
Day 8: 194.8 lbs, 23 min bike, 3x15 bench press 30lb, 2x15 everything else (shoulder 20lb, biceps 20lb, rows 20lb), 31 pushups
Day 9: 194.6 lbs, 25 min bike, 31 pushups, rest day from weights
Day 10: 194.2 lbs, 25 min bike, 2x15 all weight exercises (bench, shoulder, biceps, rows, squats)
Day 11: 31 pushups, 30 min bike, no weigh-in

Day 12: 194.4 lbs, MORNING: 25 min bike, 2x15 all weight exercises, 31 pushups, 20 deadbug. EVENING: Second weight session - 2x15 bench press 30lb, shoulder 20lb, biceps 20lb, back rows 20lb, kettlebell squats 20lb
Day 13: 195 lbs (big meal yesterday), 25 min bike, 25 min walk, 2x15 all weight exercises, 31 pushups, 20 dead bugs. FINAL DAY TOMORROW!
Day 14 (FINAL DAY): 31 pushups, 30 min bike, rest day from weights. 14-day challenge COMPLETE!
Day 15 (post-challenge): 195 lbs, 20 min bike, 2x15 all weight exercises. Challenge complete, maintaining routine!
